items.title: [正面] Okay. It's time to prepared paracetamol and painki...
items.summary:
Okay. It's time to prepared paracetamol and painkiller before save the world from this [spoiler]distorted[/spoiler] world.
It's about rude awakening in the world that fulls of horrors. No kidding. You must mastered at everything so if you misplay and prepare to go home.
And indeed. You think that this game is direct rival of Reverse 1999 right? Yes... You are right. It's very similar, but more F2P-friendly, skill-based, and better. But there're no best tier lists, but...  It has very good guide from most veteran player who knows is for stop points of awakers, how to-do and how not to-do. But Roll with your d*ck in mind.
PSA: This is long funsies review. Just give either Jester awards, Hot Takes awards, or thinks that this review is funny.
Additional Notes: Monthly Pass and Chapter Pass which give 40 Luminous Core and 2000 Silvers are best shot no doubt.

items.title:

items.summary:
Beutifull Piece of Art and Story telling;
Enjoy the game play,, rewarding when understanding the complexities and dynamics also synergies
in game guides, and has a nice deep story in chapter, just finishing chapter 1 reallly deep emotional caotical story with, amazing dephs and enjoyable gameplay loop.
Only game i actually read every flavor text i can, and the text just massively boldens with new depths once you experience the characters story, game pretty nice, not experienced technical issues, and the general game-play is quite fun.

items.title: [正面] Es bastante entretenido, la historia es buena, las...
items.summary: Es bastante entretenido, la historia es buena, las melodías me encantan, los gráficos son preciosos! Yo lo estoy disfrutando muchísimo mi única duda es, y nada que ver pero por si alguien sabe, el reinicio por día a qué hora es? xD
